This is the beginning of chapter two. The story continues here with more content and narrative development.

Additional paragraphs help ensure the formatter handles various text structures correctly.


Chapter 3: The End

The final chapter begins here with its own distinct content and conclusion.

This is the penultimate paragraph of the story.

This is the conclusion of the story for comprehensive testing purposes.
